{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Tarik
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tarik]] is a character who experienced terror while running through the mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c1">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tarik]] is a cultist who was abducted by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
